zh.lifeSummary: 當James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond於1362年6月22日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安時，他的父親James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond30歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond30歲。他於1379年6月17日與Anne Welles在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1391年住在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。他去世於1405年9月7日在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安 卡素享年43歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond于1362年6月22日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安时，他的父亲James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond30岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond30岁。他于1379年6月17日与Anne Welles在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1391年住在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼基爾堅尼。他去世于1405年9月7日在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安 卡素享年43岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 基爾堅尼高萊安。

nameMeanings.name: Boteler
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a maker of leather bottles, from an agent derivative of Middle English botel, Old French bouteille ‘bottle’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond was born on 22 June 1362, in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Ireland, his father, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, was 30 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, was 30. He married Anne Welles on 17 June 1379, in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Ireland in 1391. He died on 7 September 1405, in Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Ireland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Ireland.

fr.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond est né le 22 juin 1362, à Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlande, son père, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Welles le 17 juin 1379, à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlande en 1391. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1405, à Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlande, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlande.

de.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond am 22. Juni 1362 in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond 30 und seine Mutter Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond 30. Er hat am 17. Juni 1379 in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland Anne Welles geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1391 hat er in Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irland gelebt. Er starb am 7. September 1405 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Irland und wurde in Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond è nato il il 22 giugno 1362 nel Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, il suo padre, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Welles il 17 giugno 1379, nel Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda nel 1391. Morì il 7 settembre 1405, nel Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormondが1362年6月22日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーゴウランで生まれた時，父James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormondは30歳，母Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormondは30歳であった。1379年6月17日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーでAnne Wellesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年にはアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーキルケニーに住んでいた。彼は1405年9月7日にアイルランドコウントイ キルケニーゴウラン カストルで43歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ キルケニーゴウランにて埋葬された。

ko.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond(이)가 1362년 6월 22일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 가란에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1379년 6월 17일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 Anne Welles(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1391년도에 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 킬켄이에서 살았다. 그는 1405년 9월 7일 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 가란 카스틀에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 킬켄이 가란에 묻혔다.

pt.22 June 1362–7 September 1405: 22 de junho de 1362–7 de setembro de 1405
pt.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond nasceu em 22 de junho de 1362, em Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, seu pai, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Welles em 17 de junho de 1379, em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda em 1391. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1405, em Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.

ru.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond родился 22 июня 1362 г. в местности гоуран, коунти килкенни, Ирландия, его отцу по имени James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Welles 17 июня 1379 г. в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности килкенни, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в 1391 году. Он умер 7 сентября 1405 г. в местности гоуран кастл, коунти килкенни, Ирландия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности гоуран, коунти килкенни, Ирландия.

es.22 June 1362–7 September 1405: 22 de junio de 1362–7 de septiembre de 1405
es.County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irelan: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda
es.lifeSummary: Cuando James Boteler 3rd Earl of Ormond nació el 22 de junio de 1362, en Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, su papá, James Boteler 2nd Earl of Ormond, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Lady Elizabeth Anne de Darcy, Countess of Badsworth and Ormond, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Welles el 17 de junio de 1379, en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en Kilkenny, County Kilkenny, Irlanda en 1391. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1405, en Gowran Castle, County Kilkenny, Irlanda, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Gowran, County Kilkenny, Irlanda.
